results.title: Penelope Isles Announce New Album ‘3’
results.description: Penelope Isles will release their new album ‘3’ on September 25th. The much-loved group is pushed forward by Jack and Lily Wolter, who craft beautiful songs that sits in the crossover between dream-pop and shoegaze. It’s been three years since their last shows together, a period in which Lily went... The post Penelope Isles Announce New Album ‘3’ appeared first on Clash Magazine Music News, Reviews & Interviews .
